response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to Personio

## Budget-Friendly Options

### **Free/Freemium Tier**
- **Guidepoint** – Free for up to 10 employees
- **Zoho People** – Free plan available
- **BambooHR Lite** – Lower cost entry point
- **Factorial** – Free version with basic features

### **Low-Cost Solutions ($1-5/employee/month)**
- **Rippling** – Competitive pricing, all-in-one platform
- **Justworks** – Around $1-2/employee/month
- **Monday.com HR** – Flexible pricing
- **HubStaff** – Good for time tracking & payroll basics
- **Paycor** – Mid-range pricing with strong features

### **Self-Hosted/Open Source**
- **OrangeHRM** – Open source, low cost
- **ERPNext** – Includes HR module, affordable
- **Odoo** – Modular, pay only for what you use

## Feature-Specific Alternatives

| Need | Best Alternative |
|------|------------------|
| **Payroll only** | Wave, Square Payroll |
| **Time tracking** | Clockify, Toggl |
| **Performance management** | Culture Amp, 15Five |
| **Simple HRIS** | BambooHR |
| **All-in-one cheap** | Rippling, Justworks |

## Comparison Tips
- Consider **total employees** (unit economics improve at scale)
- Check if you need **payroll integration**
- Evaluate **free trial length** before committing

**Best budget pick:** Rippling or Factorial offer strong value for small teams.
